features.name: variable part-select with signed shift and large constant offset
features.description: Code should include a bit slice operation using a signed variable to shift and index into a packed array, where the shift calculation involves a large constant offset

features.name: signed shift variable in part-select context
features.description: Code should include a signed variable used as a shift amount in a bit extraction operation with variable width
features.snippet:
input logic signed [25:0] shift;
out = data[shift-20000+:16];

features.name: variable width bit slice with large offset
features.description: Code should include a part-select operation where both the start index and width are specified using variables and constants, creating a variable-width bit slice
